# OFARM 2 full agent navigation

Root entrypoints: README.md, PROJECT_AUTHORITY.md, ACTIVE_SUBSTANCE_README.md, AGENTS.md, llms.txt.

Generated indexes:
- package_meta/generated/authority.index.json
- package_meta/generated/materials.index.json
- package_meta/generated/contracts.index.json
- package_meta/generated/schema_example_map.json
- package_meta/generated/source_inputs.lock.json
- package_meta/generated/traceability.index.json
- package_meta/generated/handover_gate.json

Active authority order: 00_active_baseline > 02_accepted_rfcs > 01_companion_artifacts > 03_machine_contracts. All other folders are supporting, review-holding, historical, or metadata unless active law explicitly promotes something.
